description_long: This object is a large, rectangular combat tactical vehicle with a robust, armored exterior. The surface appears weathered and worn, with a muted, grayish color palette and visible signs of use. Several small, rectangular windows are present along the sides, suggesting an enclosed, protected interior. A prominent, dark turret or hatch is mounted centrally on the roof, likely for observation or weaponry. The vehicle's body is boxy and angular, with reinforced edges and panels that indicate heavy armor. There are no visible wheels or tracks, giving it a low, grounded profile.
description: A large, boxy armored combat vehicle with a central roof turret and weathered, gray exterior featuring small side windows.
description_view_0: The front and top of the vehicle are visible, showing the central turret and several side windows.
description_view_1: The left side and rear are visible, highlighting the boxy shape and additional windows.
description_view_2: The rear and top are visible, with the turret and reinforced rear panels in view.
description_view_3: The right side and front are visible, showing more windows and the angular front corners.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible turret or hatch mount on the roof, centrally located; type not clearly defined.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, reinforced panels; angular and boxy with no visible modular or reactive features.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: No distinct camouflage pattern; surface is a solid, weathered gray with some discoloration.
